description: Lock Container Orchestration to public Kubernetes-era containerized workload orchestration, and keep MLOps temporally downstream of that orchestration layer.

checks.reason: The corrected node is anchored to Kubernetes being open sourced in 2014, not the old Modern-era distributed-systems placeholder.
VM virtualization is an antecedent deployment model, not a direct container-orchestration implementation requirement.
Container orchestration manages distributed workloads across multi-node infrastructure, including cloud clusters.
MLOps & Model Serving is anchored to Google's KDD 2017 TFX publication and must remain downstream of the 2014 container-orchestration anchor.
Containerized microservice practice uses orchestration for scheduling, deployment, recovery, and autoscaling across nodes.
